title: Dual Type Starters
description: Gives starters who dont have a second type a second one, and changes movesets to reflect that for cobblemon
body:
This is a Datapack for cobblemon 1.21.1 it gives starts a secondary type if they dont already have one and gives them moves to help that change.

Pokemon
------------

Blastoise- Water/Steel
Quilava- Fire/Ground
Typhlosion- Fire/Ground
Bayleef- Grass/Fairy
Meganium- Grass/Fairy
Croconaw- Water/Dragon
Feraligatr- Water/Dragon
Grovyle- Grass/Dragon
Sceptile- Grass/Dragon
Dewott(Unova)- Water/Steel
Samurott(Unova)- Water/Steel
Servine- Grass/Dragon
Serperior- Grass/Dragon
Raboot- Fire/Fighting
Cinderace- Fire/Fighting
Drizzile- Water/Dark
Inteleon- Water/Dark
Thwacky- Grass/Rock
Rillaboom- Grass/Rock
